name: Jolly Match: First MR Match-3 Puzzles

reviews.review_description: It’s a perfect game for when you don’t want anything stressful, just chill, match, and enjoy. The visuals really pop in mixed reality and look great in your space. I do wish there were a bit more variety in objectives, but overall it’s solid and polished.

developer_response.body: Glad you’re enjoying the relaxing vibes and visuals! We’ll keep your note on objectives in mind. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Simple, colorful, and enjoyable. Great for short sessions. I’d love to see more environments or themes in future updates.

developer_response.body: Really appreciate the support! More updates are on the way.

reviews.review_description: Easy to get lost in for hours. I love that it keeps getting updates with new levels.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and for the great rating!

reviews.review_description: I like playing with hands and the levels are quick and relaxing. I also love searching for the hidden objects in each location, it’s a fun little extra that keeps me looking around the scene.

developer_response.body: We appreciate the kind words, thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Fantastic translation of the Match 3 experience to MR, with the whole package feeling very polished. I particularly enjoyed how the matching animations overflow from the board into your peripheral view, great use of mixed reality!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! It’s great to hear you had a good time with it.

reviews.review_title: Free to play! Lots of fun!
reviews.review_description: I enjoy being able to use my hands instead of the controllers. Very responsive and fun to find the small items too.  Great puzzle game that has me coming back for more.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Hope you keep enjoying the experience.

reviews.review_description: Basic gameplay, but relaxing enough to keep playing. It’s actually the game that got my mom to finally try VR.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! We are happy it helped bring your mom into VR!

reviews.review_description: Great attention to detail

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Fun little game. Nice graphics and animations what there is of it. If you're looking for a heavy duty challenge it's Hidden objects. Just started searching those lost items, and I’m missing 1–2 items in each area. This is frustrating in a way, but challenging simultaneously.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We’re glad you’re having fun with the object hunt. The hidden objects are designed to test your attention, and if you’re up for more, don’t miss the Muffin’s Treasure event for an extra challenge and rewards.

reviews.review_description: I love these little characters and rheir cute voices. Btight fun colors. Hand tracking works well on my 3s. The hidden objects on each location is a fun side quest. I am really enjoying it and hope for more and more levels to be added!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the lovely feedback! We’re happy you’re having a great time with it and appreciate you noticing the extra details. More content is definitely on the way!
Follow our news on Discord - https://discord.com/invite/jollycovr

reviews.review_description: Make is so i can launch a mini game screenwhile in video apps like youtube or the tv app

developer_response.body: Thanks for the idea! We’ll definitely consider it.

reviews.review_description: The game feels well optimized and stable, which I appreciate. After many levels, things can feel repetitive, but the core loop is still satisfying.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for leaving a review! We’re really happy the performance and stability caught your attention. Keep playing, we’ve got more on the way.

reviews.review_description: I come in almost every day to play a few levels and recharge.

I honestly didn’t expect a Match-3 game to feel this fresh again. There is something so cool about seeing the puzzle board sitting right on my kitchen table, and it makes the whole experience feel way more "real" than just staring at a phone screen.

The puzzles are super snappy, and watching the pieces fly around and clear out right in front of your face is addictive. It’s got that perfect "just one more level" loop, but it’s way more immersive because the game is actually in the room with you. It’s become my favorite way to chill out. It’s just pure, simple fun that looks amazing in MR. If you're a fan of the genre, you're going to love how this feels!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for sharing this! We’re thrilled the MR experience clicked for you and became part of your chill time. Enjoy every level!

reviews.review_description: A lot of fun to play,  but the "Pay to play" can be very frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! 
Just to clarify, the game can be fully played without paying anything. There are lots of ways to earn rewards and boosts through regular gameplay, events, and progression. We always aim to keep the experience fun and accessible for everyone, and we appreciate you sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: The hand sometimes touches pieces I'm not trying to touch. Then in the slingshot part of the game, you can't always grip the slingshot right away. Leaving the little elves able to get to me. Which is frustrating, for both the hand part and slingshot part. Please fix this. I love this game, except for these 2 mishaps.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the detailed feedback and for enjoying the game!
These issues can sometimes occur in certain lighting conditions, when hand tracking may be less precise. Keeping your hands within the cameras’ field of view can help. We continue to work on hand-tracking improvements, and fixes are in progress. We really appreciate you sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_description: I didn’t expect to enjoy this as much as I did. The MR integration feels natural and the match-3 mechanics are easy to pick up. Some levels start to feel similar after a while, but it’s still a great game for relaxing sessions

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and for taking the time to leave a review!

reviews.review_description:
This game hits diff. Visuals are crisp AF, colors pop, and it’s built to shine in MR. Gameplay’s smooth, boosters/power-ups feel super rewarding, and the chars got real charm. And the coolest bit? It doesn’t just stay on the board, stuff’s literally flying around your space. For a free game, the polish + fun factor is insane. Like, zero cents for this much wow? Unreal!!!
I don’t usually drop reviews, but had to for this one. Not just another VR test run, this feels like the first real VR/MR match-3. Solid 10/10!!!

developer_response.body: A huge thank you for this amazing review! Knowing that the game brought fun and wow moments straight into your space is the best compliment. Thanks for supporting our little MR match-3 adventure!

reviews.review_title: One of my favourite games these days!
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love playing this game; it has become my go-to game lately. The devs have done a great job with this game, highly recommended! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you very much!

reviews.review_title: Can't get enough of this game
reviews.review_description: Never thought I’d enjoy a mobile match-3 this much! Playing in VR makes it so immersive - you can actually build, search for hidden objects and explore the areas while matching! That's sick!!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We’re happy you’re enjoying the experience and exploration. Keep playing, more features and updates coming soon.

reviews.review_description: Did the 1000 levels...just doing pinata party now...waiting for more...when will more be released ??? Great game !...addictive lol.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! New levels are already on the way, and you won’t have to wait long. We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game. More surprises are coming soon. Join our Discord so you don’t miss a thing https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_description:
Edited to say now that there are tons of new levels, I have changed my rating to a solid 5 stars, because this is the best and most addicting game EVER! Thank you for making it, and please keep adding more fun features!

------------

I LOVE this game! So why am I giving it only one star?? Because I completed it in a week, and now it is UNPLAYABLE! 

I totally understand that new levels will (hopefully!) be released over time. But there is absolutely NO GOOD REASON AT ALL for you to not let us go back and replay the levels that we just completed. There is not another single game out there that cuts you off when you are done, and won't let you play it again!!! 

PLEASE reverse this idiotic decision, and let us go back and start over once we are finished. And then I will come back and change this rating to 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for updating your review - this truly made our day! 
We’re incredibly happy to hear you’re enjoying the new levels. Your support and feedback mean a lot to the team, and we’ll definitely keep working on adding more fun features. Thanks for playing and being part of the journey!

reviews.review_title: So fun, I unlocked 3 locations on Day 1
reviews.review_description: If you're a fan of match 3 games, you will love this. It's everything you know and love about a match 3 type game. It is the perfect game to wind down after a long day. There is a nice diversity of levels and difficulties, and I love the different power ups. The locations that you have to unlock are nice too. Definitely a game worth it :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your lovely review! We’re really glad to hear you’re having such a great time progressing through the game. It’s wonderful to know the gameplay, variety, and power-ups are hitting the right spot for you.

We truly appreciate your support. Enjoy the adventure, and stay tuned for more updates!

reviews.review_description: I’m really enjoying playing this game. The art is beautiful and the graphics run smoothly. I like building up my area, it actually feels satisfying. The Hidden Objects challenge is tricky; I’m still missing a few items in some spots, but that just makes me want to keep going. I’d be curious to see some kind of competitive mode added in the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re so glad you’re enjoying the game and finding the Hidden Objects challenge both fun and rewarding. Your suggestion for a competitive mode sounds exciting, and we’ll definitely keep it in mind for future updates. Happy playing!

reviews.review_description:
More than i expected from a match 3 game. Really glad they  add levels regularly

g
Update 11/25/25
wish i could give it 6 stars! has come along way since first downloadef it. Thanks for making and supporting an awesome game!
only complaint is hand controls can get awkward if you don't have both hanfs showing at all times.

developer_response.body: Your updated feedback absolutely made our day! We’re grateful for your support and for sticking with us as the game continues to grow. We’d love to invite you to join our Discord community and connect with fellow players: ttps://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_description: Jolly Match is perfect for those times you want to play something simple yet engaging. Everything runs smoothly, all of the little character designs are adorable, and working towards building the world around you adds a fun extra goal as you go through the puzzles. Next time you want to just sit down and relax while exercising your brain, give this game a try!

developer_response.body: Glad it’s hitting the right balance of simple, fun, and satisfying. Those little details really make a difference. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Been playing Jolly Match on 3s, super chill and feels cool having the board right in your room. The devs keep adding stuff, like the new Dragons Cave event where you compete for treasure. Would be fun if they added more events or ways to play with friends. Free so totally worth a try.

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you enjoyed it! Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. More events are on the way, keep an eye out!

reviews.review_description: Really enjoying the new winter event. The snowball fight mini game is a great addition, simple and surprisingly fun. Match-3 levels are still my go-to for stress relief, and the Christmas update makes the game feel fresh again

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words! 
We're really glad you're enjoying the Winter Event and the snowball fight - the team had a lot of fun making it. Happy to hear the Match-3 levels are still your favorite spot. Enjoy the holidays and have fun matching!

reviews.review_description: Played it over Christmas and it was a blast for the whole family. I adore match-3 games, and the kids got super excited shooting snowballs

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us be part of your Christmas fun! We’re thrilled the match-3 magic hit the mark!

reviews.review_description: I love this game so much, I still play it every day to pass the time even though I've reached the max 500 levels, hopefully more will be added over time.  The developers deserve big credit for keeping the game fun by excluding pay walls and ads that ruin most other games.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your awesome feedback! We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying Jolly Match every day, that means a lot to our team!

By the way, once you’ve reached level 500, the Piñata Party event unlocks, bringing endless fun and new challenges to keep the good times rolling! Join us on Discord to stay up to date with the latest news and upcoming updates - https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_description: Over 100 levels in and still hooked! I check weekly for updates ‘cause I just can’t wait to see what’s new. Love how balanced it feels, not too easy, not unfairly hard, the boards are always different, like those tricky blockers like chocolate, grass, bubbles - so it never gets repetitive. Totally worth to try! The sweets all over the place make the game even more fun. And OMG, my fav booster is the cat - I’ve got 3 cats at home, and every time that little puff comes with a cute meow, my cats look around like ‘where’s the kitty?!’ 😂

developer_response.body:
Happy to hear the difficulty feels just right and that the mechanics keep things engaging. Your note about the cat booster and your pets reacting to it is really cute, it gave us a good laugh. 😊
Thanks for following the updates so closely. We’ve got more fun additions coming soon!

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. If you play township match 3, this is VERY similar and that’s what I like about it. It’s worth playing

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’re really happy you’re enjoying the game and glad the match-3 vibes hit the spot. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
🥽 This game has phenomenal mixed reality and hand tracking support!!! It's vibrant, well designed, and fun. 🫣 I didn't know if I would like it... But I secretly LOVE it 💞. 

I would also love to see some sort of co-location support. 👫 It'd be fun to play side by side or be able to challenge each other in the same room! ⚡

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We always appreciate feedback and will take your suggestion into consideration. Come hang out in our Discord community to chat and connect with other fans - https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_title: Was a great game until the last update
reviews.review_description: ￼ enjoyed ￼ playing this for months  until I did an update  .made me go back to level one ￼ won’t be playing again if this doesn’t change ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We’re really sorry your progress was reset after the update. Our team is already working on adding a feature that will help restore progress, and we’re aiming to have it ready next week.

In the meantime, we’d really appreciate it if you could join us on Discord and contact the admins - https://mee6.xyz/i/oLmpV6giam. We’ll need a few details from you so we can help fix the issue directly.

Thanks for your patience, and we hope to get you back to your proper level soon!

reviews.review_title: Adictive and nice to play in 3D
reviews.review_description:
Played match 3 games before and thought that it wouldn't make sense to use my Quest 3 to play it 
Bah!
The match 3 mechanic is addictive anywhere, so I find myself playing it here to.
The game is well done, augmented reality helps and its comfortable to play.

2D design is a bit lazy, needs to be improved and the "complete" congratulation is annoying and very repetitive, for a VR platform that allows incredible things.

Good game, original.
4 stars until they make use of VR potential.
***actually, after a month, I change it to 5 stars. You keep adding stuff and it works flawlessly, thank you***

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for updating your review! We’re really glad you’re enjoying the new content. Enjoy matching!

reviews.review_description: My mom used to play Candy Crush a lot on her phone 🍬📱, but a few days ago I made her try Jolly Match 3 in VR 🎮🕶️. Now she’s more into VR than me 😂! She spends the whole day playing with hand tracking ✋✨ and absolutely loves it — super simple and fun to play 💖. She’s sent lots of good wishes 🙏🌸 and said a big thank you for making such a lovely game! 🎉

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for taking a moment and sharing your impressions. We’re so happy to hear your mom is enjoying Jolly Match 3 MR! Please send her our biggest thanks for the kind words and support. 
Stories like yours brighten our day and inspire us to keep creating games that bring joy!

reviews.review_description: I have been playing this game pretty much every day now for a few months and i love it. Thanks to all the people involved in making this.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your kind words and long-term support. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_title: so cute and satisfying to play!
reviews.review_description: I'm not a typical match-game fan, but this app made me a believer! The hand tracking and mixed reality makes it so easy to hop in and play a few (or a million lol) levels. The graphics, music and all the cute little details really add up to an overall satisfying, relaxing and fun game!

developer_response.body: That’s such a joy to read! Thank you for noticing the details and enjoying the experience, it truly means a lot to us. Happy puzzling!

reviews.review_description: Really fun and enjoyable MR game! I love the colors and the objects that pop up in each area. It’d be awesome if players could place them themselves. Matching and pulling off combos is super cool too. Thanks for keeping the game updated!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! The idea of placing objects yourself sounds really fun, we’ll definitely share it with the team. You’re also very welcome to share your suggestions directly with us on Discord - https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_title: The little guy startled me at first
reviews.review_description: I really didn't think that a puzzle matching game would have me so invested but here we are! When I first saw the little guy I jumped backward (LOL) but we're cool now. The game itself is very pretty, colorful, and smooth. I also really like that new things are introduced each level to keep it interesting! However, I absolutely love the item scavenger hunt, having secret stuff you have to find in games is one of my favorite things!!! Big fan and am definitely going to keep playing it cause I love it!

developer_response.body: Love hearing that the surprises, evolving levels, and secret hunts kept you hooked. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Started playing a few levels and got hooked! Super easy to get started and lots of levels to beat!

developer_response.body: It’s great to see players enjoying the game. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: I like it, it's a new way to play this type of games. It's relaxing and it keeps me entertained.

developer_response.body: We’re really glad you gave it a try, thanks for the review!

reviews.review_title: Nice balance of casual and engaging.
reviews.review_description: It’s great for short play sessions. The art style is cute and not distracting. I’d love more event content or challenges in the future, but what’s here already feels well-made.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We’re happy you’re enjoying it. By the way, we’ve just added a new Dragon’s Cave event a couple of days ago, feel free to give it a try. More surprises are on the way!

reviews.review_description: Just hit level 55 and really enjoying it so far! Bright, cheerful graphics and easy gameplay at this stage. Big thanks for keeping it free to play, good time to grab a snack or win some matches. I’ll definitely keep playing since match-3 is my fave. Match-3 in MR is something! Love the vibe here, happy gaming everyone!

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you’re loving it! Keep matching and having fun!

reviews.review_description: I’ve played a lot of match-3 games, but seeing it in my room is pretty cool. Level progression is steady, though a few early levels feel a bit slow. Still enjoyable and relaxing.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts! We’re glad the mixed reality aspect worked well for you, and we appreciate the note about the early pacing. It’s helpful feedback for us.

reviews.review_description: It runs smoothly and offers enough variety to keep things interesting. A decent pick if you want a simple puzzle game in mixed reality

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! We’re glad you’re enjoying the variety and smooth gameplay. Happy matching!

reviews.review_description: So much fun! I love how often you get free boosters, coins, and game time. The buildings, trees, and scenery are awesome! Loving the boards with so much green grass and flowers!!! Great job, developers, having a lot of fun!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the lovely review! Our team put a lot of heart into making the world feel alive and fun, and it’s amazing to hear it’s shining through for you.
Have a wonderful time matching and building, more surprises are on the way!

reviews.review_description: Like most of these match games, its fine until level 100+ when it becomes more of a pay to win model. It is interesting though,  but those annoying cake characters need a mute button.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thanks a bunch for your feedback, it really helps us make the game better! 
Keep playing daily and joining events to get awesome rewards and boosters - they’ll help you crush those tough levels in no time! :)

reviews.review_description: This app combines the fun of hunting for hidden objects with a gem-crushing sense of accomplishment.  I keep coming back to it at the end of the day to decompress.  I love it!

developer_response.body: That’s exactly the vibe we were hoping for - perfect way to unwind after a long day. Thanks for making it part of your routine!

reviews.review_description: Didn't think this game would be much as it's basically a 3 in a row .but was I so wrong this is amazing the effects and game play are so good and addictive I have completed it and can't wait for an update for more levels  please keep updating as this puts games like candy crush in the shade .thank you for such a good game .wish there were more like this as great for jumping in and out of vr when busy .

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback, it means a lot to us! Stay tuned for news and future updates, as we’re working to bring you more levels and exciting new features.

reviews.review_description:
Siimple and fun with nice graphics. The number of moves you have on a level is fair. Some levels are labeled hard or super hard and, not surprisingly, they are harder. 
The hidden objects are a lovely touch. 
It's the kind of game you pick up and play because you have 30 minutes to spare, and then find you are still playing it two hours later.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts! We’re glad the gameplay and hidden objects added to your experience. It’s great to hear the levels keep you engaged longer than expected! Join us on Discord and let the community see your achievements  https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_title: Not a Puzzle but Healing App
reviews.review_description:
At first, I thought it was just another candy game I played on the phone. However, there were no advertisements , and the game played in MR felt much more immersive to me. The level goals were not high, so as I felt the pleasure of breaking each level in short time, it became a healing game that finishes every day VR experience. Of course, it is difficult to pass the hard or hyper hard level at once, but it was easy to proceed by using the items received from in-game campaigns such as key collection and race mode properly.
The recently added City Decorations and Finding Hidden Items were also quite fun. I hope there are more City and Hidden Items, although the rewards for completing the hard-found hidden items seem insufficient compared to the campaign rewards.
I achieved my last 400 level yesterday. I can't wait for the extra level to come out.
Thank you to the developers for making this excellent game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your detailed review! We’re happy to hear Jolly Match 3 MR brings you both fun and relaxation. Huge congratulations on reaching level 400, that’s amazing! We’ve just added 100 new levels, and there are even more surprises coming very soon. Enjoy matching!

reviews.review_title: A perfect game to train your attention
reviews.review_description: A very well-known match-3 game in VR guise. You can both relax and also train your attention, escaping from the daily routine. In addition to the gameplay and many other bonuses, you have to go through different areas/locations to find hidden objects. The game is accessible to the general public - from children and teenagers to the elderly. You have my recommendation ;-)

developer_response.body: Thank you for recommending the game! If you’d like to swap tips or share your journey with others, we’d be happy to see you in our Discord community https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_title: NOTHING like the other ones y’all!😍
reviews.review_description: Fun fun fun!!updates I can’t wait and ck for daily lol!! and not really had to purchase a lot as of yet and over 100 levels played plz devs keep it alive caus only game I don’t mind here and there to pay to grab a few extra boosts or more bonuses out of any I hav ever played befor caus it’s a balanced easy /hard balance, a great mixup of powerups constantly added so don’t get repetitive!! Worth it to buy add ons!  It’s NOT those easy for a moment and then no way to even pass the level or ever can without having to only buy type ones. Updated once already but getting impatient ONLY caus addicted and obsessed so ITS YALLS FAULT DEVS!!!🤣 Son now u owe me fast updates like now !!!😝

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your enthusiastic feedback! We're delighted to hear that Jolly Match 3 AR has become one of your favorites and that you’re enjoying the gameplay balance and variety. We're actively working on new updates, stay tuned, more fun is on the way!

reviews.review_description: Ok, so I love this game and wish there were more in VR. The problem is that I find that after a certain level, it is almost impossible to get past and either you spend money on a boost or get totally frustrated and stop the game. I don't want to spend tons of money each time I play! I get it but come on really. 🙄 also the amount of time it takes for new places is beyond me. But I do love it grrrr lol

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts, we’re glad you’re enjoying the game! 

Some levels can be challenging, but there are various ways to earn extra rewards that help you progress without spending money. For example, discovering Hidden Objects in the areas gives you chances to earn coins and extra lives. For even more bonuses, the Jolly Pass can be activated once every 30 days offering significantly greater rewards for regular play.

We add new content every month, usually with new locations and events, so there’s always something fresh to discover. 

For any questions about the reward system or other features, you’re welcome to reach out on our Discord, where our team is ready to assist - https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_description: I love match-3 games, so I was really happy to find one in VR. The mini-games were a great surprise, and the Christmas vibes combined with the slingshot mechanics are super engaging. Aiming was a bit tricky at first and I failed a few waves, but once I got the hang of it, it became really fun and satisfying.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the lovely review! 
We’re really happy to bring those holiday vibes into the game and to hear that you enjoyed the Winter update and the slingshot game. Aiming can take a little practice, so it’s great to know it became fun and satisfying once you got the hang of it. 
Happy Holidays!

reviews.review_description: Nice! It’s actually kind of helpful when the game shows possible moves… or maybe I’m just getting old. lol 💕

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We’re happy to hear you’re enjoying the game and that the hints make it even more fun to play.

reviews.review_description: I can't say enough about how much I enjoy this game. Just have a small problem that I am sure can be corrected. About a month ago after an update, every time my moves run out the game disappears and I have to restart the game to continue.

developer_response.body: Thanks for bringing this to our attention! We’d love to help resolve it, but we’ll need a bit more information to investigate. Please reach out to us at info@jollyco.us so we can discuss the details directly.

reviews.review_description: I didn’t expect to get this hooked, but Jolly Match 3 AR is dangerously addictive—in the best way. Every time I tell myself I’m done for the day, I end up saying ‘just one more round’… and then five rounds later, I’m still grinning. It’s such a clever, colorful, and satisfying twist on classic match-3 gameplay—and the AR element makes it feel fresh and totally immersive.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear Jolly Match 3 AR is keeping you coming back for “just one more round”. Happy matching!

reviews.review_description: This match 3 puzzle game is truly addictive. Thought I was just gonna try a couple levels but ended up enjoying it and playing this for hours and hours. Very well polished and well made. Team listens to feedback and makes improvements that actually matter.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and sharing your thoughts! We love hearing feedback and suggestions from the community, they inspire us and guide what we focus on next.

reviews.review_description: Playing Jolly Match-3 AR may cause a sugar addiction and long lost contact with friends and family. You may be reported missing. And to continue that sugar high when you’re away from your VR, you can find the game on your phone’s App Store. You’re welcome. 🤭

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing! We hope your friends will come find you in the sweet land and join the fun 😉

reviews.review_title: I was never really into match-3 games
reviews.review_description: Not a hardcore gamer, but after a long day, it’s perfect to chill and relax. Jump in, play a few levels, unlock a new area, and it actually helps me think a bit strategically too. Completely hooked

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! Happy gaming, and we hope each new area keeps bringing that perfect mix of fun and relaxation!

reviews.review_description:
Normally, you show me anything that even looks like a Candy Crush type game and I'm out. But I decided to try this out for the love of VR.

And I gotta say I was shocked. This is extremely well-executed, runs smooth, puzzles actually keep the game fresh, it's extremely responsive and I don't need controllers (which is great for me because I normally use hand navgiation to get around Quest). Best of all it's FUN. Even to someone like me who usually doesn't like these kinda games.

developer_response.body: We’re so glad you gave it a try and had fun! Thanks for sharing your experience, glad the puzzles and smooth gameplay hit the mark. Join our Discord to chat with the community and share more VR moments: https://discord.gg/GfhXvMMGEZ

reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying this game.  I prefer using controllers instead of hand tracking.  The game is very addictive and I spent a few hours playing on my initial try.  I wish the controllers had force feedback to match all the special effects in the game but not a deal breaker.  It's basically Candy Crush in VR and I love it.  The game is a really good use of mixed reality and one of the best MR games IMO.  THANKS! [⋮]~))

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the detailed feedback! We’re happy you’re having fun and appreciate the suggestion about force feedback, definitely something to keep in mind for future updates! Feel free to join our Discord and chat with the community: https://discord.gg/GfhXvMMGEZ

reviews.review_description: Really amazing gaming. The kind of mobile phone that's very fun to play in VR/MR, but.. it's very low quality (grafically). I wish the resolution was higher, with better anti aliasing in the quest 3. Hope it gets even better with further updates

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you very much for your useful feedback! We're going to improve it in the further updates.

reviews.review_description: I got bored very quickly with the similar mobile games and though this is more attractive, I lost interest after a couple of rounds. Now, the effects are great, graphics are great, it's a very attractive game, just not for me. So, this is not a bad review. Many people really love these games and I'm sure they're going to love this too, it's just not my style. Gave it 5 stars because I think it deserves it, but not everyone likes the same thing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts! We really appreciate your honesty and your kind words about the visuals.

reviews.review_description: I’m so into games like this on my phone and when I played this game I was blown away! The colors are so beautiful and the graphics and animations just has me stuck playing level after level. I’ve had my headset since 2021 and I was about to surrender to the fact that I couldn’t find anything I liked until I came across this lively and lovely game! You saved me!! 😀😀😀

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for this amazing review! We're beyond happy to hear that Jolly Match 3 AR hit the sweet spot for you. Knowing it brought back the fun truly means the world to us. You made our day, thanks for giving it a try!

reviews.review_description:
Jolly Match 3 AR is incredibly fun and easy to get hooked on!  The power-ups are cute and satisfying, and collecting all the mini landmarks is so fun. Perfect for match-3 fans who want something fresh and immersive! Love it!

If you love collecting, enjoy AR experiences, or just crave a fresh twist on classic match-3 gameplay, this game is a must-try! It’s one of those “I’ll just play one more level” games that somehow ends with you unlocking half the map. Absolutely love it!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing! Wishing you many more “just one more level” moments!

reviews.review_description: Jolly Match 3 AR is everything you’d want in a match-3 experience — fast, colorful, and loaded with content. This MR game lets you play in your own space and decorate familiar surroundings with the rewards you earn. It starts off intuitive but quickly becomes strategic and deeply satisfying. I find myself jumping in for a few minutes just to relax and make progress. It’s beautifully executed, incredibly addictive, and a shining example of how great MR gaming can be. Huge thanks to the studio — your passion shows, and we appreciate the quality you bring to the Meta headsets game library!

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the kind words :) Such feedback encourages us to bring more fun experience in VR/MR :)

reviews.review_description: Honestly, this game is too fun...I logged on to check something and ended up playing for 20 minutes lol

developer_response.body: We’re so glad the game pulled you in like that, thanks for playing!

reviews.review_title: Really like it & expect it will improve!
reviews.review_description: Downloaded after watching MissChiefVR's play vid. I can't remember what level I'm on, but I just started the 3rd of the 4 available scenes or maps. A few glitches noted, such as both times I made a purchase, hand tracking disappeared. And I'm not a fan of the bubblegum style scenes with so many pastels. That said, what I like about this compared to similar games on mobile is that gameplay feels a little more focused or meditative. Oddly, I feel more relaxed playing in VR vs playing on a phone. Hoping more maps or scenes are released. (PS Love the little donut guy that says 'hi' to me!)

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for your detailed feedback! More scenes with other elements are coming 😉 
We tried to reproduce the issue with hand tracking disabled you mentioned, however the glitch wasn't detected. Would you mind joining our Discord channel JollyCo https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb and sharing a video?

reviews.review_description: Really fun colourful game to play. The visuals are spectacular and the hand tracking perfect. I don't see a way in settings to turn off the hints that activate within about 5 seconds if you don't make a move. Maybe I'm missing it but if not, it makes the game too easy.

developer_response.body: UPDATE: Hello! With the latest update, you now have the option to disable hints. Simply open the settings by tapping the gear icon, then toggle the “Hints” option off. And if you want to chat with the team or join our community, we’d love to welcome you on Discord - https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb

reviews.review_title: Chill and relax in Jolly Match 3
reviews.review_description: Jolly Match 3 AR on Quest is a charming blend of classic match-3 gameplay and mixed reality magic. It transforms your living room into a vibrant puzzle board, complete with hand tracking, quirky boosters like the Space Kitty, and miniature worlds to rebuild. It's light, colourful, and surprisingly immersive-a sweet pick for casual players looking to dip into MR fun

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your impressions. We're glad you found the mix of classic gameplay and MR features enjoyable. Your feedback means a lot!

reviews.review_description: I reached max level so the game become dead, now they added new levels so I can continue, when hitting max level they should really add the option to replay past levels

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, it really helps! We’ll review your suggestion to add a replay option for past levels with our team. 
Great to hear you’re enjoying the new levels. Stay tuned, more content is already on the way!

reviews.review_description: Played on the Oculus quest 2.  Instead of playing a mobile matching game on your phone you can be there in VR.  Physically move around getting some exercise playing it rather than just your thumbs on the phone.  Unlocked things on the way gone through first 3 or4 worlds so far.  Reported a few bug but already been fixed. Quick responses.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience and for your feedback along the way. Happy matching as you continue your journey!

reviews.review_title: Really Good Match 3 Released for Free?!
reviews.review_description: I like the MR hands playing. There are 4 areas so far with hopefully more coming. I think the only issue is the graphics could probably be bumped up on Q3 as there are jaggies, maybe something a QGO profile will address regardless. Really surprised no one else has done some VR ports of the big mobile games out there. Wishing the devs much success with this one.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your feedback! More areas, levels and improvements are coming in the further updates ;)

reviews.review_description: This would have been a fantastic game ,, but 90% is stuck behind an $80 paywall

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you experienced difficulties completing the game. 

Please note that all packs are totally optional, and purchasing them is not required to enjoy the full experience. The game can be played entirely for free, from start to finish. Additionally, there are various ways to earn coins in-game, which can be used for extra lives, boosters, and other helpful rewards. Moreover, the game receives regular updates with new levels and content every month — all absolutely free.

We hope you’ll consider giving it another try, trying out different strategies that may help you complete the levels and fully enjoy the experience. If you need assistance you can always reach us out on our Discord - https://discord.gg/RrT9hJbQRb. We will be happy to help.

reviews.review_description: Delightful match 3 game - so fun to play in AR . I didn’t expect to like it so much. Love how immersive the effects feel. Fun to build virtual worlds right in you own room as you progress thru the levels.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Have fun matching and building!

reviews.review_description: Is what I thought when I heard about this game.  Seeing that it is from the makers of Sugar Mess I had to give it a try.  How cute is this game!!  I love it!  They made it its own matching game. So well done.   Very addicting and so cute!! My only complaint is I find myself trying to pet the little cake or donut each time he says Hi.🤭.  Great job once again developers!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and your passion! :)

reviews.review_description:
To be completely honest, I'm not a big fan of games like this on mobile phones, but this being in MR, I had to check it out... I only played a few levels so far, but I must say, I'm pleasantly surprised.

Visually, it looks excellent (if a bit low res). 3d effects, animations, mix of MR and (kind of) VR. It all works surprisingly good. And the game is fun.

The only con: I didn't figure out how to move around playing window/board. It seems to be fixed in its position. That means I need to have raised arms and this can become tiresome after a while.

Anyway, it's fun! And I believe this kind of casual games will have a nice future on the (rumoured) much lighter and smaller standalone MR goggles that Meta is planning to release next year.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for giving it a try! We're glad to hear it turned out to be a pleasant surprise for you. 😊

Regarding the board positioning: you can zoom in and out using your fists, and you can also adjust the scale in the settings by tapping the small gear icon in the upper right corner.
